Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1000 "TERMINALCITY-1000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Terminal City.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the JSR $181D instruction at $1271 to be JSR $9C00 instead (this is to allow the game to be started with the fire button in port 2 from the intro sequence). 2. Added a small routine at $9C00 which checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the game will behave as if F1 is pressed and start the game. If not pressed, it then calls the subroutine at $181D to carry on the normal code flow.
